title: Lunar with mods
description: Lunar doesn't have these features let's fix that
body:
Lunar Client already has a ton of great mods, but I wanted to take it a step further!

Inspired by Intel edits (check out his video here: [https://youtu.be/vR0XMeLUmik?si=LLF1_cPzbLQ0OdM4](https://youtu.be/vR0XMeLUmik?si=LLF1_cPzbLQ0OdM4)), I created a mod pack designed to enhance your experience on servers like Hypixel or CubeCraft.

This pack includes features like:

Improved Performance: Mods like "Bobby" "Sodium" help your game run smoother
Fixed Crosshair: No more annoying offset! This pack ensures your crosshair is perfectly centered.
Extra Features: You'll find a variety of helpful features to make your gameplay even more enjoyable
**note: If you don't have an video graphics card uninstall "nvidium" It isn't compatible with non Nvidia graphics cards**
